name: Roppongi
sourceQuote: OSAC Japan Crime & Safety Report 2024: 'Roppongi is Tokyo's premier entertainment district and has a higher-than-average incidence of drink-spiking, assault, and theft targeting tourists, particularly late at night.'

name: Kabuki-cho
sourceQuote: OSAC Japan Crime & Safety Report 2024: 'Kabuki-cho in Shinjuku is Tokyo's largest red-light and entertainment district; drink-spiking, overcharging scams, and assault risks are elevated, especially after midnight.'

name: Ikebukuro Entertainment District
sourceQuote: OSAC Japan Crime & Safety Report 2024: 'The entertainment areas around Ikebukuro station's west exit have elevated pickpocketing and overcharging risks similar to Roppongi and Kabuki-cho.'

name: Akasaka
sourceQuote: OSAC Japan Crime & Safety Report 2024: 'Akasaka's bar and entertainment strips see periodic pickpocketing and tourist-targeting scams; visitors should keep valuables secure in crowded venues.'

name: Harajuku Takeshita Street
sourceQuote: OSAC Japan Crime & Safety Report 2024: 'Harajuku and Omotesando are generally safe but Takeshita Street experiences periodic pickpocketing in peak-crowd conditions due to its extreme density during weekends.'
